creator: dima@unixfreak.org
text:
pfrench@firstcallgroup.co.uk writes:
> 
> >Number:         27028
> >Category:       docs
> >Synopsis:       LINT comment for USER_LDT should mention xmovie
> >Description:
> 	The comments for USER_LDT in LINT state that it is required by WINE
> 	and ports/aviafile, but nothing else. The latest port of xmovie also
> 	appears to require this option.

I think that list entire should go.  It's silly for us to try to keep
track of all programs that use this option.  It's like listing
programs that require ``options INET''.

					Dima Dorfman
					dima@unixfreak.org
